Bulk QR Code Generator

Upload a CSV with your URLs or text, and generate all the QR codes at once. No sign-up, no limits, no server upload — it all runs right in your browser.

How It Works

  1. Prepare a CSV file with one column: your URLs or text lines
  2. Upload the CSV (or paste the data)
  3. Choose size, format, and error correction level
  4. Click generate — all QR codes render in your browser
  5. Download individual images or a ZIP bundle

CSV format example:

url https://example.com/page1 https://example.com/page2 https://example.com/page3

Bulk Tool Comparison

Tool Max batch Sign-up Cost Format
QRMint (this) Unlimited (browser RAM) None ✓ Free PNG / SVG / ZIP
Bitly bulk 500 / batch Required $8/mo PNG
QR Code Monkey 100 / batch Not required Free (with limits) PNG / EPS / SVG
QR.io bulk 200 / batch Required $7/mo PNG / SVG
Go to the QR tool →

Bulk CSV support is available on the homepage. Paste your data or upload a CSV file.

FAQ

How many QR codes can I generate at once?

As many as your browser can handle. For 100-500 codes there should be no issue. For 10,000+, your browser may slow down. We recommend splitting large batches into groups of 1,000.

What file formats are supported?

PNG and SVG. PNG for print and web, SVG for vector editing in tools like Illustrator or Inkscape. ZIP download bundles all images together.

Is my data safe when uploading a CSV?

Yes — the CSV is read entirely in your browser using JavaScript's FileReader API. No data is uploaded to any server. Once you close the tab, everything disappears.

© 2026 QRMint — free QR code generator. Static codes never expire.
